entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The art and science of changing the traits of plants to produce desired characteristics

entities.name: TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of plants that are modified during crop improvement

entities.name: DOMESTICATION
entities.description: A basic method of crop improvement involving the adaptation of wild plants for human use

entities.name: INTRODUCTION
entities.description: A basic method of crop improvement involving bringing a plant variety to a new area

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: A basic method of crop improvement involving the crossing of genetically different individuals

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: A basic method of crop improvement involving the choosing of desired plants

entities.name: GENETIC PRINCIPLES
entities.description: The fundamental laws of heredity used in plant breeding

entities.name: CULTIVARS
entities.description: Plant varieties developed to be more suited to the needs of people

entities.name: AGRONOMY
entities.description: The science of soil management and crop production used in plant breeding

entities.name: BOTANY
entities.description: The scientific study of plants used in plant breeding

entities.name: GENETICS
entities.description: The study of genes and heredity used in plant breeding

entities.name: CYTOGENETICS
entities.description: The study of the structure and function of the cell nucleus and chromosomes used in plant breeding

entities.name: MOLECULAR GENETICS
entities.description: The study of the structure and function of genes at a molecular level used in plant breeding

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of the functions of living organisms and their parts used in plant breeding

entities.name: PATHOLOGY
entities.description: The study of diseases used in plant breeding

entities.name: ENTOMOLOGY
entities.description: The study of insects used in plant breeding

entities.name: BIOCHEMISTRY
entities.description: The study of chemical processes within and relating to living organisms used in plant breeding

entities.name: BIOINFORMATICS
entities.description: The application of computer science and statistics to biological data used in plant breeding

entities.name: STATISTICS
entities.description: The science of collecting and analyzing numerical data used in plant breeding

entities.name: MENDEL LAWS
entities.description: The laws of inheritance rediscovered at the beginning of the 20th century

entities.name: FARMERS
entities.description: Individuals who have performed plant improvement and maintained varietal diversity for thousands of years

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Plants domesticated for food, feed, medicines, and textiles

entities.name: CLIMATES
entities.description: Environmental conditions to which crops are adapted

entities.name: CULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Human-led agricultural practices to which crops are adapted

entities.name: VARIETAL DIVERSITY
entities.description: The range of different varieties within a crop species

entities.name: HABITAT
entities.description: The natural home or environment of an organism

entities.name: TRADITIONAL KNOWLEDGE
entities.description: The skills and knowledge of local farmers in maintaining crop diversity

entities.name: GENETIC MAKEUP
entities.description: The genetic composition of a plant variety

entities.name: EVOLUTIONARY FORCES
entities.description: Natural forces that cause changes in the genetic makeup of varieties over time

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL SYSTEMS
entities.description: Interacting biological entities that co-evolve

entities.name: ECOSYSTEM
entities.description: A biological community of interacting organisms and their physical environment
